sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for NES port

special_mechanics.name: Inner Energy Charge Attack
special_mechanics.description: Players can hold the punch button to charge up with 'inner energy' and throw a powerful long-range attack that hits all opponents in front of the player

special_mechanics.name: Jumping
special_mechanics.description: Basic jump mechanic available to players from start

tier_notes: Tier 3 (T3) - Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides only gameplay mechanics and design information, no precise physics parameters, sub-pixel data, or numerical values for movement/gravity/jump mechanics. NES port-specific physics documentation not available in provided sources.
